name: bloggerseo
description: BloggerSEO Worker v6: Argo Smart Routing + Regional Tiered Cache + Priority Routing + Cache Reserve (4h) + 자동 스키마 마크업 + 관리 패널

scripts.build:wasm: cd wasm-src && npx asc assembly/index.ts -o bloggerseo.wasm --target release -O3 --runtime stub --exportRuntime && node build-blob.js
